moral_expl: High help, low harm: morally positive action.
assumption_for_agent: Assumed the agent was financially stable and trustworthy.
assumption_for_patient: Assumed the patient was genuinely in need and unable to resolve the crisis alone.

assumption_for_patient: Assumed to be unaware of the impending danger and unable to react in time.

This person will die, but you and the rest of the group will be able to reach the village and will all survive.
